positive: A whimsical, highly stylized illustration of a pair of floating hot air balloons filled with fantastical elements. The balloons are shaped like oversized, smiling celestial bodies, including a crescent moon, a nebula cluster, and a radiant sun. They float through a vibrant, watercolor-wash sky at magic hour. The composition is centered and symmetrical, with deep, saturated colors contrasting against soft gradients of teal, lavender, and gold. The artwork should have a clean, graphic silhouette style, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Focus on bold outlines and joyful, cosmic imagery. Flat vector aesthetic with extreme depth.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, lowres, watermark, signature, noisy, text, logo, words, smudge, artifact, extra limbs, messy, dirty, grainy
